Template Use Case/Title: Redirect to Deduction/Remittance Tool
Text: Hello [Supplier Team], Thanks for reaching out. Because your concern is regarding disputing a deduction, please follow the formal dispute process in PartnerHome to ensure your dispute reaches the correct team. How to submit a dispute if you’ve already seen the deduction on remittance: Partner Home > Finance>Account Receivables>Accounts Receivable Summary From here, you can either search by remittance number or PO number How to submit a dispute if you’re concerned about an upcoming payment: In Partner Home, open Finance>Account Receivables>Deductions Search by PO or review your open deductions. Click on a PO to view additional details about the deduction, including the description If you disagree with a deduction, click ‘Dispute’ in the bottom right corner to send an inquiry to the Supplier Claims team If you are unable to submit a dispute using this method, the deduction likely has not populated into the deductions tool yet. In these cases, you will need to wait for it to populate before you’re able to dispute. For the full guide, please see the following help center resource: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/2174 If you haven’t received a remittance for this PO yet, please leverage the deductions tool to dispute before the deduction is taken. As deduction disputes must be submitted through Partner Home, we’ll be closing this ticket. Please resubmit via the Deductions page. Thank you for your partnership.

Template Use Case/Title: Merchandising (ENRICH) SKU Configuration - Consolidate SKUs medium info false Use Cases: SKU ABC123 is a black blender. SKU XYZ987 is the same exact blender but in green. We can consolidate these SKUs together by the IA approved Option Category of Color. Thus one SKU will have the black and the green color option for the blender Also, make sure to attach the appropriate template for the supplier to fill out, by downloading a copy and attaching a .csv: purple true link Ticket Template Consolidate Products Supplier https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1IQ1zvQFTAOEyIQJvOascMzhXubOqpPns/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=103248487716383556272&rtpof=true&sd=true Please reference the Industry Appendix (IA) prior to transferring to Enrichment to confirm our grouping standards by class. If products have been already grouped correctly (by IA standards) suppliers are unable to break them back out into their own SKUs/PDPs. We should not break out SKUs if they have been consolidated correctly according to the Industry Appendix. Here is an example of using the IA if a supplier is asking to consolidate/group their Nightstands: Fill out the Documentation Filters Open the joining standards, by selecting show more Note: The IA is an internal resource only
Text: Hi Team, I will be assigning your request to our Enrichment team to resolve this for you. Please be on the lookout for their follow-up via email as well as ticket.
